programme.title: Kedai Antik Wak Jambi
programme.desc: It tells about an antique shop located in a small town owned by Wak Jambi. Story has it that four men used a bowl from Wak Jambi shop to worship unseen things. A woman enters Wak Jambi store and decided to buy a stopwatch. She robs a bank and stops the time and freeze the employees. She ends up lives alone in nature and beings forever. One day, Wak Jambi encounters a homeless man called Along and

programme.title: Dream Man
programme.desc: Sekumpulan lima rakan mula mengalami peristiwa ngeri sejak akaun Facebook misteri menghantar permintaan untuk menjadi rakan kepada mereka.

programme.title: Don't Come Back Alive
programme.desc: Police officer Camila, criminal prosecutor Fatima, and police detective angel, face extremely dangerous situations, gruesome murder cases and evil criminals everyday without flinching. During a case in a suburban area, they encounter a sinister female figure, a result of a suicide-by-immolation ritual. Unfortunately for them, the bloodthirsty being, who is more powerful than death itself, is here

programme.title: Bila Malam Pocong Menangis
programme.desc: 3 friends who are bike enthusiasts spend the night camping on a river bank in the forest. While having a good time, they are startled by an unusual sound. Upon paying attention, they realize it is the sound of someone crying. Joey, being the bravest of the trio, goes into the forest in the direction of the voice. Afraid of being left behind and not wanting to split up, Hazama and Celli have no cho

programme.title: Arwah Noni Belanda
programme.desc: Batavia, 1834. Hellen Van Stolch was the only daughter of Jacob, a Dutch-German landlord with a large plantation. She suffered a tragic fate of untold horror and her vengeful spirit roams the land until this very day. One day, she appears in the subconscious of Sarah Astari, a novelist who is working on a horror story. At first, Sarah is oblivious to this inter-dimensional intrusion and thinks it

programme.title: Pengabdi Setan
programme.desc: A mother finally passes away after suffering for three years from an unknown disease. With his wife gone, the father leaves the children to go work out of town. Eerie situations soon take place as the children discover that their mother has come back to visit them and is taking them along on her new journey.

programme.title: Hospital
programme.desc: Amira, a village girl, comes to the city to interview for the position of nurse in a hospital. While trying to find the hospital, she meets Dahlia who works there. Amira is accepted for the position and Dahlia invites her to be her housemate. Ever since then, Amira is haunted by spooky encounters and even starts to see ominous shadows. Her acquaintance with a young doctor, Farid, adds to all the c

programme.title: The Jurassic Games
programme.desc: Every year, 10 of the world's most lethal death row criminals compete for their freedom in The Jurassic Games, a TV show where contestants must survive against ferocious dinosaurs and each other. The last survivor is granted freedom, fame, and fortune.

programme.title: Dendam Sundel Bolong
programme.desc: This horror story revolves around a woman who was brutally wronged and murdered, then rises from her grave to seek revenge.

programme.title: Malam Tahlil Suhaila Balik
programme.desc: In bearing the pain of Suhaila's death, her husband faces an unexpectedly problem when she returns home at one of his 'tahlil' nights.

programme.title: Janin Emas (Ko-Mun-Thong)
programme.desc: Alia and Amran move into a new house with their daughter Dania, who finds King Ravana's Mask in a storeroom, unleashing strange and eerie events.

programme.title: Kabin Di Tepi Tasik
programme.desc: After returning from overseas, Rusyd investigates the mysterious death of his father. His search for truth leads him to a remote lakeside cabin, where dark secrets begin to surface.

programme.title: Conjuring Spirit
programme.desc: In the wake of her husband's betrayal, a detective writer and her 5-year-old son move into an old apartment where they receive a strange music box by chance. Tormented by horrible nightmares, she determines to find out the truth behind the spooky music box and the angry spirit within.

programme.title: Main-Main Hantu
programme.desc: A team of netball players spend the night in a dilapidated bungalow taken care of by an elderly couple. They are spooked by things that go bump in the night. Is it spirits, or something far more nefarious?

programme.title: Don't Come Back Alive
programme.desc: Police officer Camila, criminal prosecutor Fatima, and police detective angel, face extremely dangerous situations, gruesome murder cases and evil criminals everyday without flinching. During a case in a suburban area, they encounter a sinister female figure, a result of a suicide-by-immolation ritual. Unfortunately for them, the bloodthirsty being, who is more powerful than death itself, is here

programme.title: Kampong Pisang Bersiri Siri Ep13
programme.desc: Kg. Pisang is shocked by the death of Pak Din. Pak Jabit holds an election to pick the new village chief. Chaos ensues when a hantu Raya appears.

programme.title: Kampong Pisang Bersiri Siri Ep14
programme.desc: Why does Pak Din frowning? What ghost that scares the most? Which incident in Kg.Pisang are the most spooky one? All will be answered in the FINAL EPISODE of Kg. Pisang Bersiri-Siri.

programme.title: Pengabdi Setan 2
programme.desc: Several years after a terrible incident cost their mother and youngest sibling their lives, Rini and her siblings Toni and Bondi live with their father in flats. They believe living in flats with many people is safe, but they soon realize this might be dangerous if they don't know their neighbors. On a night full of terror, Rini and her family must save themselves.

programme.title: Dream Man
programme.desc: Sekumpulan lima rakan mula mengalami peristiwa ngeri sejak akaun Facebook misteri menghantar permintaan untuk menjadi rakan kepada mereka.

programme.title: Exorcism : Haunted Child
programme.desc: My Lan, a singer who has lost her voice, often thinks that 'there is no such thing as ghosts.' When she is assigned to attend an art school to complete a special director training course, she is requested to move to the upper floor of the school throughout the course. From then on, My Lan is constantly haunted by mysterious beings that alter her belief in the existence of ghost.

programme.title: Korban Penunggu Hospital
programme.desc: 5 sekawan bermain sebuah permainan bernama Turut Perintah Bakawali di sebuah hospital tinggal Seorang demi seorang diragut nyawa ketika bermain permainan tersebut.

programme.title: Kisah Seram Hostel
programme.desc: Pada satu malam, sekumpulan pelajar asrama bercerita tentang pengalaman seram masing-masing. Tapi apabila malam kian larut, perbezaan antara cerita dan realiti menjadi semakin samar.

programme.title: Pontianak Sesat Dalam Kampung
programme.desc: On a mission to find the naughtiest person's blood to save King Ponti, Ros Kembang wanders into a village. Starring Kamal Adli and Emma Maembong.

programme.title: Hosts
programme.desc: A father with a dark secret unknowingly invites a demonic entity, disguised as his neighbours, into his home to enjoy Christmas dinner with his family.

programme.title: Cucuk Sanggul Seroja
programme.desc: Suri terjumpa cucuk sanggul lama yang dihantui oleh roh Seroja, wanita yang mati membunuh diri kerana cintanya dihalang.

programme.title: Haunted Universities 2nd Semester
programme.desc: Every campus has its own horror tales. There's an endless supply of ghost stories passed down from class to class, and three of the scariest tales will be told this time: The 'C' Bed, The Final Year's Cheer and The Old Science Building.

programme.title: Orang Minyak Kampung Lenggong
programme.desc: Amir makes a pact with a supernatural village elder for wealth, but breaking the no-bribe rule ruins him. To reclaim riches, he becomes the feared Orang Minyak, hunting corrupt men in Lenggong village.

programme.title: Exorcism : Haunted Child

programme.title: Jodoh Syaitan
programme.desc: Megat returns to his village to be married off to a woman of his mother's choice. Awang and Kulup, are tasked by Tok Chai to look for a dead body to bring back to life.

programme.title: Pintu Neraka
programme.desc: Kamasani, a business tycoon with terminal cancer seeks Mahabub, a mysterious recluse rumoured to possess a cure. programme.title: SPM Pro+ Matematik Ep03
programme.desc: Jom kita ulang kaji subjek Matematik KSSM Ketaksamaan Linear dalam 2 Pemboleh Ubah (Graf) SPM bersama Sir Ifwat, yang akan menghuraikan analisis soalan KBAT, teknik menjawab & Tip Pro+.

programme.title: SPM Pro+ Matematik Ep04
programme.desc: Jom kita ulang kaji subjek Matematik KSSM Fungsi & Persamaan Kuadratik (Graf & Julat) SPM bersama Sir Ifwat, yang akan menghuraikan analisis soalan KBAT, teknik menjawab & Tip Pro+.

programme.title: SPM Pro+ Matematik Ep05

programme.title: SPM Pro+ Matematik Ep06
programme.desc: Jom kita ulang kaji subjek Matematik KSSM Fungsi & Persamaan Kuadratik (Julat) SPM bersama Sir Ifwat, tutor pakar Matematik yang akan menghuraikan analisis soalan KBAT, teknik menjawab & Tip Pro+.

programme.title: TVP@TTV Matematik Ting. 3 Ep02
programme.desc: Tajuk ini membincangkan cara membuat dan menentusahkan konjektur tentang hubungan antara sudut tirus dan nisbah sisi segi tiga bersudut tegak, serta metakrifkan sinus, kosinus dan tangen.

programme.title: TVP@TTV Matematik Ting. 3 Ep01
programme.desc: Tajuk ini membincangkan mengenai sisi bertentangan dan sisi bersebelahan dalam segi tiga bersudut tegak, hubungan antara sudut tirus dan nisbah sisi segi tiga bersudut tegak.

programme.title: TVP@TTV Matematik Tambahan Ting. 4 Ep04
programme.desc: Tajuk ini membincangkan mengenai penyelesaian masaalah yang melibatkan nombor indeks dan indeks gubahan.

programme.title: TVP@TTV Matematik Tambahan Ting. 4 Ep05
programme.desc: Tajuk ini membincangkan mengenai penggunaan pengamiran dalam menyelesaikan sesuatu masalah.

programme.title: TVP@TTV Matematik Tingkatan 1 Ep05
programme.desc: Tajuk ini menerangkan cara mencari perimeter dan luas bagi segi tiga, segi empat, lelayang dan trapezium, serta perkaitan antara perimeter dan luas.

programme.title: TVP@TTV Matematik Tingkatan 1 Ep06
programme.desc: Tajuk ini membincangkan mengenai garis selari dan garis rentas lintang, dan ciri-ciri berkaitan, serta mengenal dan melukis, sudut sepadan, sudut selang-seli dan sudut pedalaman.

programme.title: TVP@TTV Matematik Tingkatan 2 Ep01
programme.desc: Tajuk ini membincangkan mengenai hubungan antara lilitan bulatan dan diameter bulatan, menerbitkan rumus luas bulatan, menentukan luas bulatan,lilitan bulatan,panjang lengkok dan luas sektor.

programme.title: TVP@TTV Matematik Tingkatan 2 Ep02
programme.desc: Tajuk ini menerangkan mengenai sukatan kecenderungan memusat yang tertumpu kepada tiga jenis sukatan iaitu mod, median dan min.

programme.title: No Strings Attached
programme.desc: After a break-up, Adam is looking for a casual relationship when he runs into Emma, and they agree to maintain a strictly physical association, but things get complicated when they both fall in love.

programme.title: The Lake House
programme.desc: Love blooms when Kate, a doctor, exchanges letters with Alex, an architect who is fed up with his life. Unknown to them, they lead lives two years apart.

programme.title: Maid in Manhattan
programme.desc: The heir to a political dynasty falls for a hotel maid who is also single mother, thinking of her to be a socialite. However, both realise that they are completely different as the truth comes out.

programme.title: Surviving Christmas
programme.desc: A lonely rude millionaire bribes a family to celebrate Christmas with him.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: Sports agent Jerry Maguire tries to get back on his feet after being fired from his job. However, the only client he has is Rod Tidwell, a disgruntled football player who wants a better contract.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: While trying to escape the evil wizard Gargamel, the blue-skinned Smurfs get sucked into a vortex that teleports them to New York. Thereafter, they try their best to find a way back home.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby
programme.desc: After breaking up with Mark, Bridget meets a handsome stranger, Jack. Soon, Bridget finds out that she is pregnant but is unsure about the identity of the father.

programme.title: Blended
programme.desc: After a terrible blind date, Jim and Lauren find themselves stranded at a resort together with their respective children. However, the two soon start developing feelings for each other.

programme.title: What's Love Got to Do with It?
programme.desc: Filmmaker Zoe Stevenson documents her Pakistani best friend's journey to an arranged marriage. Over time, the process begins to make her challenge her own attitudes towards relationships.

programme.title: Shiva Shakthi Thiruvilayadal
programme.desc: Lord Shiva and his wife, Goddess Parvati, navigate their relationship and duties and offer sacrifices and brave separation to selflessly care for humanity.

programme.title: Perazhagi
programme.desc: A young girl named Pothum Ponnu is ridiculed by her family and friends for having a darker skin tone. With her mother's support, she overcomes all the hurdles and continues to follow her passion.

programme.desc: When a transsexual is found murdered in a church, suspicion falls on a priest (Eric Stoltz) who resigned from a parochial school after rumors of abuse.

programme.desc: A case involving the rape and murder of a teacher hits a snag after the woman's illicit sexual history is exposed.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A cop-turned-activist (Eric Roberts) becomes a suspect in the killings of several rapists who were recently paroled.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: Brittany Stork's decades-long quest to find out more about her mother's mysterious death leads to a dramatic courtroom decision; the man at the center of the case tells his side of the story.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: When three FBI agents are killed in an explosion following a successful undercover sting operation, the team searches for the person behind the attack.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: When a missile test is hijacked and sent off course, the team searches for the hacking group responsible for the attack with the help of a computer specialist Hetty brings in to assist the team.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Callen and Sam resume their undercover identities as a prisoner and guard to infiltrate a white supremacist group believed to be in possession of stolen nuclear material.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The murder of a software company employee leads Benson and Stabler to a fired co-worker who may have a horrifying motive for the slaying.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler have the gruesome task of identifying the remains of a man and woman who were stabbed in a park.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detective Stabler races against time to determine if a convicted man on death row also murdered and raped another victim.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Assistant DA Cabot jeopardizes the detectives' careers and her own when she exceeds legal limits to collect evidence against a serial child-abuser.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a transsexual is found murdered in a church, suspicion falls on a priest (Eric Stoltz) who resigned from a parochial school after rumors of abuse.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An ex-convict who sexually assaulted prostitutes appears to have been killed by a would-be victim, then another homicide suggests the woman may be a manipulative serial killer.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a corporate mogul is found murdered, evidence points to his son, whom the detectives suspect was seduced by his stepmother.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detectives hunt for the sadist who tortured a senile old woman (Jane Powell), investigating her nursing home, as well as her scheming son (Jay Thomas).

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives launch a search for a serial killer who raped and murdered two women in Central Park. Michael Gross guest stars.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detectives Benson and Stabler hunt for the fiend who raped and impregnated a comatose patient; the trail leads them to a doctor (Bruce Davison) whose stem cell research is funded by a billionaire with Parkinson's disease.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler are joined by Briscoe (Jerry Orbach) and Green (Jesse L. Martin) when a 6-year-old shooting victim tests positive for a sexually transmitted disease.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Alexandra Cabot questions a pediatrician (Judd Hirsch) about a dead baby found in a cooler in the East River.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Evidence points to an angry ex-boyfriend when a cocktail waitress is murdered outside a popular nightspot.

programme.desc: The rape of a veteran police officer is first linked to her ex-husband's gambling debts, and then to her fellow officers.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a corporate mogul is found murdered, evidence points to his son, whom the detectives suspect was seduced by his stepmother.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: After being suspended by the San Francisco Police Department's Special Investigation Unit, Nash Bridges finds himself drawn back into the fold when a figure from his past resurfaces. Now, he must confront a changing city, a new boss, and a world in which police work focuses on modern data-crunching and predictive policing. Although the world around him has changed, Nash hasn't.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: After arriving in Chicago to assist Voight and the team with a rape/murder case that has distinct similarities to a decade-old case from New York, Sgt. Benson asks Fin and Amaro to help; the prime suspect asks for a meeting with Lindsay.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: Still struggling with a loss, the team must put feelings aside when a café is bombed; Atwater winds up in hot water after making a mistake.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: A mass shooting takes place in an athletic club; Atwater deals with his new assignment; Halstead and Platt try to check up on Lindsay.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: Voight and the team help retired Cmdr. Perry extract his nephew from a corrupt unit; Lindsay struggles to stay clean; a woman from Olinsky's past contacts him.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: Intelligence pursues heroin kingpin Derek Keyes; Lindsay's downward spiral continues; Olinsky tells Platt about a secret from his past; Roman talks to Burgess about his concerns regarding Ruzek.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: Roman and Burgess discover the corpse of a young boy who was reported missing; Burgess talks to Ruzek about Roman's suspicious behavior; Bunny plans to make a statement that could impact Voight's career.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: A desperate man searching for his daughter holds a member of the team hostage; Voight learns about the accusations Bunny made regarding a case from his past; Antonio finds out that Olinsky has been keeping a secret.

The members of the 118 are called to a series of emergencies around Christmas Eve; Eddie struggles with an emotional Christopher.

Athena, Bobby and the 118 must rescue a family whose pick-up truck has been rigged with a pipe bomb that will detonate if the vehicle slows down and goes under 55 mph; Eddie has a rough transition into his new job; Buck makes a relationship decision.
Chimney is determined to find a missing Maddie amongst the chaos of St. Patrick's Day.

programme.title: Satu Malam Perawan

programme.title: 5 Minit
programme.desc: A young father, who had his daughter out of wedlock, relives his misspent youth while waiting the infinite 5 minutes to find out whether his own teenage, unmarried daughter is now pregnant.

programme.title: Walid Ep03
